title: struthiopteris penna-marina
intro: Struthiopteris penna-marina, also known as the sea spleenwort, is a type of fern that grows in coastal areas and is typically found in Britain and Europe. The medicinal properties of Struthiopteris penna-marina include its ability to act as an astringent and anti-inflammatory, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. Struthiopteris penna-marina is often prepared for herbal use by drying the fronds and leaves, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or used in salves and ointments.
